title: Tools, Device Commands, PBQs, and Certification Capstone · Packet Lens: Net Device Show Commands
summary: Use software, hardware, discovery, capture, and device evidence to design, implement, secure, operate, and repair a branch network. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net device show commands increment in a performance-based branch network capstone. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret MAC table, route, interface, configuration, ARP, VLAN, and power command outputs without assuming vendor syntax.
Choose toner, cable tester, tap, Wi-Fi analyzer, and visual fault locator with correct media, safety, and evidence limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
